description: Design token palette — canonical hex values for press and partnership use.

ink.role: Primary dark / body text / dark backgrounds

paper.role: Primary light / paper background / light surfaces

cyan.role: Brand accent / primary highlight / interactive states

cyan-deep.role: Secondary cyan / hover states / on-paper accent

fog.role: Dark card / elevated surface on ink

muted.role: Muted text / secondary labels / monospace captions
